name: agent-tempo
description: Short skills for deadline pacing, disciplined waiting, and high-throughput agent execution.

interface.longDescription: Use Tempo to guide coding agents through deadline-aware delivery, bounded waits, and efficient concurrent or parallel execution.
defaultPrompt: Use the relevant Tempo skill for this task.
Complete this within 5 minutes and report useful progress before the deadline.
Process these samples with bounded concurrency and preserve output order.
